step_rationale: Chemokine-driven monocyte/macrophage recruitment and platelet activation in plaque inflammation.
mechanism: RANTES (CCL5) recruits monocytes and macrophages to inflamed atherosclerotic plaques and directly activates platelets, amplifying vascular inflammation.

references.title: Identification of Key Genes as Early Warning Signals of Acute Myocardial Infarction Based on Weighted Gene Correlation Network Analysis and Dynamic Network Biomarker Algorithm.
Aldosterone increases early atherosclerosis and promotes plaque inflammation through a placental growth factor-dependent mechanism.
references.journal: Journal of the American Heart Association

references.title: Chronic dysfunction of the endothelium is associated with mortality in acute coronary syndrome patients.
